products.name: HFE Intelligent Electromagnetic Flow Meter
products.desc: High-accuracy EM flow meter for conductive liquids. DN6–DN3000, ±0.5% FS, bidirectional, zero pressure loss, SS316L/Hastelloy/Ti electrodes, RS485/HART.
products.overview: The HFE Intelligent Electromagnetic Flowmeter uses Faraday's law of electromagnetic induction to measure flow of any electrically conductive liquid, including slurries, acids, alkalis and paper pulp. No obstruction — zero pressure drop. PTFE, Neoprene, FKM and PFA liner options. 316L, Hastelloy, Titanium and Tungsten Carbide electrodes. DN6 to DN3000 covers the widest possible range.

specs.label: Accuracy
specs.value: Full-bore: ±0.5% R (DN400+ better than ±1%); Insertion: ±2.5% R

specs.label: Applicable media
specs.value: Acid, alkali, salt, paper pulp, mud, any conductive liquid

specs.label: Liner material
specs.value: PTFE / Neoprene / Polyurethane / FKM / FEP / PFA

specs.label: Electrode material
specs.value: 316L / Hastelloy B / Hastelloy C / Ti / Ta / Pt-Ir / WC

features: Zero obstruction: no moving parts, no pressure drop, no mechanical wear
High accuracy ±0.5% R for liquid, ±1.0% R for gas; unaffected by density, viscosity, temperature, or pressure
Temperature and pressure compensation: auto-corrects volume flow to standard conditions in real time
Liner options: PTFE, Neoprene, Polyurethane, FKM, FEP, PFA for any chemical compatibility
Electrode options: 316L, Hastelloy B/C, Titanium, Tantalum, Pt-Ir, Tungsten Carbide
Wide operating range: −40°C to 130°C process temperature; up to PN40 pressure rating
Self-diagnostics detects empty pipe, electrode fouling, and signal anomalies
Multiple interfaces: 4-20mA, pulse output; RS485 (Modbus), HART for PLC/SCADA integration

products.name: HFU Ultrasonic Flow Meter
products.desc: Time-of-flight industrial ultrasonic flowmeter with TGA technology. DN15~DN1200, ±1% accuracy, IP65/IP68, clamp-on/insertion/inline modes.
products.overview: The HFU Ultrasonic Flowmeter uses a proprietary Time-of-Flight (TGA) algorithm for industry-leading precision. Available in clamp-on (external clip), plug-in and inline configurations. No pipe cutting required for clamp-on — install on any material pipe (steel, plastic, cast iron) without shutting down production. FPGA chip with 700,000 logic gates for high-speed signal processing.

specs.label: Sensor protection
specs.value: IP68; shielded twisted-pair cable; standard 9 m; max 300 m

features: Clamp-on installation: zero pipe cutting, zero production downtime
Proprietary TGA Time-of-Flight algorithm: measurement rate over 300 times/second; accuracy below 1.0%
Powerful FPGA chip with 700,000 logic gates: high-frequency sampling with bubble/impurity tolerance
Handles intermittent bubbles or impurities within 5 seconds without losing measurement
Easy clip-on installation: no need to stop water supply or halt production
Durable metal housing: conductive, thermally stable, impact-resistant and crush-resistant
Bidirectional flow measurement; high-resolution colour LCD display; large 10-year data memory

products.name: HFV Intelligent Vortex Flow Meter
products.desc: Karman vortex flowmeter for liquid, gas and steam. DN15~DN300, ±1.0% liquid / ±1.5% gas, RS485/HART, −40°C~400°C.
products.overview: The HFV Intelligent Vortex Flowmeter measures flow based on the Kármán vortex street principle — the shedding frequency of vortices is directly proportional to flow velocity. No moving parts means low maintenance cost. Integrates temperature and pressure sensors for direct mass flow output. Battery-powered option enables installation in locations without power infrastructure.

specs.label: Accuracy
specs.value: Liquid ±1.0% R; Gas / Steam ±1.5% R; Insertion ±2.5% R

specs.label: Applicable media
specs.value: Gas: air, O₂, natural gas, LPG; Liquid: water, oil, acid/base; Steam: saturated / superheated

features: High accuracy: liquid ±1.0% R, gas and steam ±1.5% R; no moving parts, no mechanical wear
Temperature and pressure compensation: real-time capture with auto error correction to standard conditions or mass flow
Wide operating range: −40°C to 400°C, up to PN63 pressure rating for complex conditions
Battery-powered option: lithium battery version operates over one year continuously without external power
Multiple interfaces: 4-20mA, pulse output; RS485 (Modbus), HART for PLC/SCADA integration
Large LCD display shows instantaneous and cumulative flow on-site
Rated up to 25 MPa with vibration-resistant sensor technology
